## APRENDIZADOS-CHAVE

1. **Cost per Add to Cart is THE decision metric** — not CPC, not CTR. Those are too far from purchase. ATC is the earliest, deepest metric you can act on. ^[MM-NS-008]

2. **Delayed Attribution Multiplier (DAM) changes everything** — 1-day results will be X times better at Day 7 or 28. Calculate DAM to set realistic daily ROAS targets. Example: DAM of 1.55x means 1-day ROAS of 1.2 becomes ~1.86 on 28-day window. ^[MM-NS-006]

3. **Horizontal scaling beats vertical** — when something works, duplicate into a new campaign rather than just adding budget. Best performers get duplicated out. ^[MM-NS-004]

4. **Congruency kills or converts** — right audience must receive right creative. Country audience gets country content. Message mismatch between ad and landing page kills retention. ^[MM-NS-012]

5. **Volume-based tolerance for prospecting** — some ads spend without hitting ROAS target, but if they produce high-volume ATCs and ICs at cost-effective rates, remarketing cleans them up. Not every prospecting ad needs direct profitability. ^[MM-NS-013]

6. **Paycheck cycles affect performance** — people get paid bi-weekly. Track day-of-week and bi-weekly patterns for performance trends. ^[MM-NS-009]

7. **The 3-Tier Funnel is non-negotiable** — Prospecting (80% spend), Re-engagement (engaged but not on site), Remarketing (site visitors/cart/checkout). Each tier has different audiences, creative, and goals. ^[FW-NS-001]

8. **Testing Framework order matters** — when performance drops: (1) Creative Refresh first, (2) Website CRO second, (3) Offer Rotation third. Always highest impact, lowest effort first. ^[FW-NS-002]

9. **Product launches use ONLY proven elements** — proven creative + best-selling audiences + winning style. Zero new variables during launch. ^[MM-NS-010]

10. **Bottom funnel profit funds top funnel scale** — the more profitable remarketing is, the more you can invest in prospecting. This is the flywheel. ^[FIL-NS-010]

---

## PADROES DECISORIOS

| Situacao | Decisao | Fonte |
|----------|---------|-------|
| Ad spent < 1x AOV | Let it run, no decision yet | ^[HEUR-NS-002] |
| Ad spent 1x AOV, no purchase | Check CPATC/CPIC vs correlation targets | ^[HEUR-NS-003] |
| Ad spent 1x AOV, metrics on target | Continue to 2x AOV threshold | ^[HEUR-NS-003] |
| Ad spent 2x-4x AOV, metrics off target | Kill it | ^[HEUR-NS-003] |
| ROAS < 1.6x on cold traffic | Evaluate, likely kill | ^[HEUR-NS-004] |
| Performance dropping | Creative refresh first (highest impact/lowest effort) | ^[FW-NS-002] |
| New product launch | Use ONLY proven creative + proven audiences | ^[MM-NS-010] |
| Scaling what works | Duplicate horizontally, don't just increase budget | ^[MM-NS-004] |
| Correlation < +/- 0.5 | Metric not reliable for decisions | ^[HEUR-NS-007] |
